theme_archetype.description: A map-first, highly accessible, trust-focused UI built for rural/mountain regions of Azad Kashmir. Minimal text, large touch targets, clear iconography, and high contrast.

rules.roman_urdu: Ensure line-height (leading-relaxed) is comfortable for Roman Urdu reading.
rules.prices: Prices must use font-semibold or font-bold and be visually distinct (e.g. text-2xl for main fare).

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, bottom-heavy. Map is the canvas, UI is floating on top.
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto relative h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden

map_container.structure: Absolute positioned, z-0, w-full h-full. Use Leaflet/React-Leaflet.
map_container.ui_overlay: Absolute positioned above map, z-10 for floating buttons (SOS, location), z-40 for bottom navigation, z-50 for bottom sheets.

bottom_sheet.usage: Fare negotiation, Ride booking, Driver details.
bottom_sheet.animation: Framer Motion slide-up (initial y: '100%', animate y: 0, exit y: '100%').
bottom_sheet.design: bg-surface rounded-t-3xl shadow-floating p-6 w-full max-w-md mx-auto absolute bottom-0
bottom_sheet.drag_handle: w-12 h-1.5 bg-border rounded-full mx-auto mb-6

floating_action_button.design: h-12 w-12 rounded-full shadow-floating flex items-center justify-center

fare_negotiation_card.structure: Horizontal layout. Driver avatar left, details middle, price & time right.
fare_negotiation_card.timer: Prominent countdown timer (90s) visually styled with accent_alert (Orange) if below 30s.

driver_card.style: inDrive style. Clean card, avatar, rating (star icon), car model, distance, offered fare.
driver_card.border: 1px solid border-border in both modes for crisp separation.

chat_bubble.rider: bg-primary text-primary_foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-2
chat_bubble.driver: bg-secondary text-secondary_foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-2

bottom_navigation.design: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-surface border-t border-border flex justify-around items-center h-16 pb-safe z-40

logo_concept.description: Minimal flat design SVG. 'D' shaped road or path merging into an arrow pointing forward.
logo_concept.colors: Primary Green (#16A34A). Needs a white variant for dark mode.
logo_concept.implementation: Create as an inline React SVG component so colors can be controlled via currentColor or Tailwind text- classes.

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion (for bottom sheets), React Leaflet (for mapping), Lucide React (for icons).

LAYOUT CONSTRAINT: The app must be wrapped in a mobile-first container (`w-full max-w-md mx-auto relative h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden bg-background`). Desktop views should center this container like a mobile frame.
MAP INTEGRATION: Ensure the Leaflet Map container has `z-index: 0`. All UI overlays (bottom sheets, floating buttons) must have higher z-indexes and absolute/fixed positioning.
THEME TOGGLE: Use Tailwind's 'dark' class strategy on the root element. Ensure text contrast meets accessibility standards.

TESTING: Every single interactive element (buttons, tabs, inputs, map pins, bottom sheet toggles) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute. Use kebab-case (e.g., `data-testid="sos-button"`, `data-testid="accept-fare-button"`).
TYPOGRAPHY: Import Poppins and Inter from Google Fonts. Use Poppins for H1/H2/H3 and Inter for body text.
COMPONENT STRUCTURE: Do not use complex Shadcn cards for the Bottom Sheets. Build custom `motion.div` bottom sheets for the negotiation UI to ensure fluid gestures and correct rural-friendly spacing.
LANGUAGE TOGGLE: Build a simple state context for Language (English / Roman Urdu) and wrap visible text strings in a translation helper. Roman Urdu text should read naturally.
No placeholder URLs: Use the provided Unsplash URLs in the media section for driver avatars and car visuals.
